  Template: round_report.md
  Purpose:  Human-readable analyst output, emitted by the LLM alongside
            next_round_config.json.
  Keep this tight — one page is ideal. It is read by humans doing review.
-->

# Round {{source_round_id}} → {{target_round_id}} report

**Bundle hash:** `{{source_bundle_hash}}`
**Generated by:** {{generated_by.tool}} / {{generated_by.model}} / prompt `{{generated_by.prompt_version}}`
**Generated at:** {{generated_at}}

## 1. What happened in round {{source_round_id}}

- Best value: **{{best_value}}** ({{direction}})
- Compared to parent round: `{{delta_vs_parent | default:"N/A"}}`
- Pruning rate: {{pruned_pct}}%, failure rate: {{failed_pct}}%
- Dominant structural signal: {{dominant_signal}}

## 2. What I recommend for round {{target_round_id}}

| # | Action | Target | Before → After | Evidence |
|---|--------|--------|----------------|----------|
{{#each diff_summary}}
| {{@index}} | {{this.action}} | `{{this.target}}` | `{{this.before}}` → `{{this.after}}` | {{this.evidence}} |
{{/each}}

## 3. Rationale

{{rationale}}

## 4. Risks / things to watch next round

- {{risks}}

## 5. Stop-condition check

- Improvement over last round: {{improvement}}
- No-improvement rounds in a row: {{no_improvement_rounds}}
- Remaining trial budget: {{remaining_budget | default:"N/A"}}
- Recommendation: {{continue_or_stop}}

## 6. Review

- [ ] Schema-validated (`next_round_config.schema.json`)
- [ ] Bundle hash matches on-disk bundle
- [ ] Every diff row has evidence
- [ ] Reviewer: {{reviewer.kind}} / {{reviewer.id}} / {{reviewer.approved_at}}
